meta.eps_matched_doc: native eps: 0.03 vs 0.10; cross-system control, both N=2

PCI.note: Real overlap PCI from annotated_results; independent of regime count.

TBS.note: TBS_norm is sweep-window dependent; window_band shows its range under +/-10-20% window cropping. tbs_observable_intrinsic is the window-robust companion (0.5-span crossing position).

topology.note: Regime-count + adjacency agreement, counted once (replaces collinear RCD+SDI of v1).

flags: N_CONFOUND: regime counts equal — legacy v1 Phi was inflated by count match; trust PCI_real for true overlap.
COMPONENT_DISAGREEMENT: real-overlap PCI and topology term diverge by >0.3 — single Phi is not a faithful summary.
TBS_WINDOW_FRAGILE: TBS_norm moves >0.1 under window cropping — boundary-shift verdict is sweep-window dependent.
